solutions.solution:
Change of symbols according to the question.
? = 18 × 5 + 5 + 6 = 18 − 5 + 5 × 6
(using VBODMAS rule)
= 18 − 5 + 30 = (18 + 30) − 5 = 43

Let us check all the options one by one.
From option (a), LHS = 30 − 5 + 4 + 10 × 5
(using VBODMAS rule)
= 30 + 5 − 4 × 10 + 5
= 30 + 5 − 4 × 2 = 30 + 5 − 8
= 35 − 8 = 27 and RHS = 62
∴ LHS ≠ RHS
